_comment: retrospective-improvement-plan M3.1 hook manifest. planning-analyst is data-producer-class (zero-write); workflow only writes retrospective.md + project-context.md.

hooks.purpose: Enforce retrospective-stage zero-write semantics: only retrospective.md + project-context.md are writable.
Deny fenced YAML contract blocks and forbidden section headings (memory_update_contract, execution_result, role_verdicts) in retrospective.md.
Block direct Write/Edit of retrospective.contract.yaml; all contract writes must go through harness-cli.
Block direct Write/Edit of project-context.md; all lesson writes must go through harness project-context add-lesson.
Block direct mutation of template source paths (.harness/common/rules, skills, agents, schemas).
Advisory: check trace log for Step 5 gate evidence before retrospective stage complete.
Record planning-analyst dispatch in trace JSONL; exit 2 if planning-analyst dispatch is BLOCKED (no main-agent substitution).
